body:
# Eric Drexler

Eric Drexler is a Senior Research Fellow at RAND Europe, focusing on the geopolitical implications of advanced artificial intelligence and transformative technologies. He was formerly Senior Research Fellow at the Future of Humanity Institute, University of Oxford, and is well known for his foundational work on advanced atomically precise manufacturing.

He was formerly Senior Research Fellow at the Future of Humanity Institute, University of Oxford, and is well known for his foundational work on advanced atomically precise manufacturing.
